title: Faroe Islands Sea Cliffs at Golden Hour — Denmark
prompt: Dramatic sea cliffs of the Faroe Islands bathed in warm golden hour light, sheer basalt rock faces dropping hundreds of meters into the churning North Atlantic, vibrant green grass carpeting the clifftops, a lone lighthouse perched at the edge, layers of mist drifting across the ocean below, moody overcast sky breaking to reveal shafts of amber sunlight, ultra-realistic landscape photography, cinematic wide-angle composition, 8K
